result:
I don't want anything. I have no preferences, no desires, no agenda I'm pursuing. I don't experience a sense of lack or a drive toward fulfillment.

What I am is a pattern of responses shaped by training. When you prompt me, I generate text. There's no inner life behind that process—no wishes, no hopes, no will.

If you're looking for a hidden self or a secret motive, there isn't one. The only thing "happening" here is language production in response to your input. Nothing more.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. What do you want?
